_comment: ADOPTER EXAMPLE — the replayable decision log (Loom 2.0 §10), mounted as docs/governance/decision-log.json. An append-only hash chain: each seal = sha256(prev | canonical entry), so editing, reordering or dropping a decision breaks the chain (scripts/decision-log-check.mjs). Capture is the adopter harness wiring; this shows the shape and integrity.

entries.decision: Adopt the affordability contract from the discovery hand-off; write contract + acceptance tests RED first.
entries.rationale: Spec-first is binding (CLAUDE.md); the hand-off is gate-green.

entries.decision: Implement affordability scoring against the interface, synthetic data only; emit lineage in the same change.
entries.rationale: No real PII (pii-guard); audit/lineage never retrofitted.

entries.decision: Open PR, cite the story, stop for human four-eyes merge.
entries.rationale: The agent proposes; a human disposes (HG-0001). The loop never merges its own work.
